import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import'./WelcomeScreen.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const WelcomeScreen=_ref=>{let{language,onLanguageChange}=_ref;const navigate=useNavigate();const[currentQuoteIndex,setCurrentQuoteIndex]=useState(0);const[sessionId,setSessionId]=useState('');const languages=[{code:'en',name:'English',flag:'🇬🇧'},{code:'hi',name:'हिंदी',flag:'🇮🇳'},{code:'ta',name:'தமிழ்',flag:'🇮🇳'},{code:'te',name:'తెలుగు',flag:'🇮🇳'},{code:'bn',name:'বাংলা',flag:'🇮🇳'},{code:'kn',name:'ಕನ್ನಡ',flag:'🇮🇳'},{code:'mr',name:'मराठी',flag:'🇮🇳'}];const content={en:{title:'Sahayak AI',subtitle:'Your voice matters. 112 ஐ அழைக்கவும்'},te:{title:'సహాయక్ AI',subtitle:'మీ గొంతు ముఖ్యం. మీ భద్రత ముఖ్యం. మీరు ఒంటరిగా లేరు.',quotes:['సహాయం అడగడం బలం యొక్క సంకేతం.','మీరు ఒంటరిగా లేరు.','మీ ధైర్యం అన్నింటినీ మార్చగలదు.','మాట్లాడడం వైద్యానికి మొదటి అడుగు.','మీరు సురక్షితంగా అనుభవించడానికి అర్హులు.','ప్రతి గొంతు ముఖ్యం.'],experienced:'నేను ఏదో అనుభవించాను',witnessed:'నేను ఏదో చూశాను',safeWordSetup:'సేఫ్ వర్డ్ సెటప్ చేయండి (ఐచ్ఛికం)',emergency:'అత్యవసరం? 112 वर कॉल करा'}};const text=content[language]||content.en;// Generate unique session ID on component mount
useEffect(()=>{const generateSessionId=()=>{const year=new Date().getFullYear();const randomNum=Math.floor(Math.random()*10000).toString().padStart(4,'0');return"SAH-".concat(year,"-").concat(randomNum);};setSessionId(generateSessionId());},[]);// Rotate quotes every 4 seconds
useEffect(()=>{const interval=setInterval(()=>{setCurrentQuoteIndex(prevIndex=>(prevIndex+1)%text.quotes.length);},4000);return()=>clearInterval(interval);},[text.quotes.length]);const handleEntryPoint=type=>{// Store session ID and entry type in localStorage
localStorage.setItem('sahayak_session_id',sessionId);localStorage.setItem('sahayak_entry_type',type);// Navigate to chat page with entry type
navigate('/chat',{state:{entryType:type,sessionId}});};const handleSafeWordSetup=()=>{navigate('/safe-word-setup');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"landing-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"language-bar",children:languages.map(lang=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"lang-toggle ".concat(language===lang.code?'active':''),onClick:()=>onLanguageChange(lang.code),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"flag",children:lang.flag}),lang.name]},lang.code))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"landing-content",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"main-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"app-title",children:text.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"app-subtitle",children:text.subtitle}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"entry-buttons",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"entry-btn experienced",onClick:()=>handleEntryPoint('experienced'),children:text.experienced}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"entry-btn witnessed",onClick:()=>handleEntryPoint('witnessed'),children:text.witnessed})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"quote-section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"rotating-quote",children:text.quotes[currentQuoteIndex]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"safe-word-section",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"safe-word-link",onClick:handleSafeWordSetup,children:text.safeWordSetup})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"emergency-notice",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"emergency-icon",children:"\u26A0\uFE0F"}),text.emergency]})]})})]});};export default WelcomeScreen;
